holdings.infoBox: HOLA is an equity ETF with a total of 223 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares MSCI EAFE ETF stock at 32.95%, ASML Holding at 4.11%, AstraZeneca at 1.91%, Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 1.75%, and Tokyo Electron at 1.53%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan International Hedged Equity Laddered Overlay ETF (HOLA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in international equities across all market caps with a laddered options overlay. The fund seeks downside protection and lower volatility while aiming for improved risk-adjusted returns over a full market cycle HOLA was launched on Jul 11, 2025 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
